macro_goal: switch control and drive the active shape through the downward corridor until one yellow and one purple shape correspond
level_hypotheses: ACTION5 still switches which shape is currently controlled
repeated downward movement is the main progress primitive on level 2
short lateral repositioning is needed before or after the downward run
one valid correspondence is enough; not every shape must match

entities.name: black_doted_shape
entities.notes: movable cursor-like shape visible on the board

entities.name: gray_shape
entities.notes: switching control changes which shape movement affects

entities.name: yellow_shape
entities.notes: one side of the correspondence pair

entities.name: purple_shape
entities.notes: matching anchor for the movable yellow shape

win_condition_hypotheses: level advances after one correct yellow-purple correspondence
progress comes from repeating the successful downward corridor pattern after switching control

constraints.description: ACTION5 changes which entity subsequent movement controls
selected shapes can cross dotted guide lines while progressing downward
yellow shapes may leave the grid boundary during the successful pattern

anti_patterns: do not spam ACTION5 without following it with movement
do not assume every visible shape must be matched before the level can advance

subgoal_tests.description: confirm ACTION5 switches the controlled entity on level 2
probe repeated ACTION2 as the main downward corridor move
subgoal_tests.verification: the active shape moves through the corridor or crosses a dotted guide line

subgoal_tests.description: probe ACTION3 as a lateral reposition before the descent run
subgoal_tests.verification: the active shape repositions sideways without immediate failure

subgoal_tests.description: after switching control, chain short lateral repositioning with repeated ACTION2 descent until the level advances
subgoal_tests.verification: level advances after a switch-plus-move correspondence sequence
